stonetop.summary: Lightning-stinging maggot-things that swarm out of the cursed river.

system.concept: Lightning-stinging maggot-things that swarm out of the cursed river.
system.description: Each one is a few feet long, like a cuttlefish crossed with a giant maggot, squirming wet and gray, a face full of feelers whose touch stings like lightning. They spend most of their lives in the water, congregating near power-crystals and aetherium artifacts claimed by the river, entranced by the passive energy — but when they sense something meatier, they wriggle out fast. Some Hillfolk claim they're merely tadpoles, and tell of larger, many-legged terrors that fling lightning from man-long feelers. Probably just spook-stories. Probably.
